tool.name: glassdoor_compare_companies
tool.description: Compare two companies on Glassdoor side by side. Provide both company overview URLs and get ratings, reviews summary, salary data, and key metrics for comparison.

parameters.name: company1_url
parameters.description: Glassdoor overview URL of the first company (e.g. 'https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Google-EI_IE9079.htm')

parameters.name: company2_url
parameters.description: Glassdoor overview URL of the second company (e.g. 'https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Microsoft-EI_IE1651.htm')
